name: pheno-runtime-config
description: Hot-reloadable runtime configuration library for the pheno-* fleet (L37). Active, under 10 KB. Small surface, tested, dependency-light. Federated into phenotype-infra per ADR-049. Stays a standalone crate for clean versioning.
federation_reason: Single-crate surface (~10 KB) too small to standalone; types are referenced from phenotype-infra configs. Kept as separate crate for clean semantic versioning.
evidence_summary: Hot-reloadable runtime configuration library for the pheno-* fleet (L37). Active, under 10 KB. Small surface, tested, dependency-light. Federated into phenotype-infra per ADR-049. Stays a standalone crate for clean versioning.
